wasm Directory Reference(3) Library Functions Manual wasm Directory Reference(3)

NAME

wasm Directory Reference

SYNOPSIS

Directories


directory stubs

Files


file backtrace.c
WASM implementation for backtrace (no-op in web). file console.c
Browser console logging for WASM via Emscripten. file ffmpeg_decoder.c
file init.c
Platform initialization for WASM/Emscripten. file lifecycle.c
file string.c
String utility functions for WASM/Emscripten. file system.c
System utilities for WASM/Emscripten - includes generic implementations. file terminal.c
Terminal abstraction for WASM/Emscripten via EM_JS bridge to xterm.js. file threading.c
Threading abstraction for WASM/Emscripten using pthreads. file time.c
Time functions for WASM/Emscripten.

Version 0.9.19 ascii-chat
